notes: 6 people at $9.00/adult and $6.00/child. Children 2 and under free. Valid at Franklin Park Zoo or Stone Zoo. Daytime admission only — not valid for Zoo Lights events.
raw: 1 Franklin Park Road Boston, MA 02121 617-541-5466 Get Directions Pass is good for the Franklin Park Zoo in Boston or the Stone Zoo in Stoneham, MA. Admits 6 people at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child. Children 2 years and younger are free. Pass can only be used for daytime admission. They can't be used for Stone Zoo Zoolights or Franklin Park Zoo Boston Lights. Visit museum website for more information.
